text.title: Vision Language Model Provider Selection Failure Modes

antipattern.root-cause: Author copied a text-LLM cost model.
antipattern.fix: Switch to per-image (or per-tile) cost model; cross-check against provider invoices.

antipattern.symptom: Sole-provider design; pipeline halts on outage.
antipattern.root-cause: Vendor lock-in not flagged in design.
antipattern.fix: Always wire a fallback VLM behind the same adapter.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline assumes valid JSON from every VLM call.
antipattern.fix: Add Pydantic enforcement + one-shot retry; surface remaining failures to review queue.
